titleStmt.title: SII 17.308: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 308. (A.R. No. 279 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
Rājēndrachōḷa I. Year 21: 1032-33 A.D. Damaged and incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉiThis praśasti is full of scribal mistakes.
runilamaṭantaiyum
pāvaiyum cirttaṉi celviyum taṉ peruṉteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuyir Ūḻiyil
Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelippaṭarvaṉavāci
yum cuḷḷiccūḻmatiḷ koḷ
kaiyum naṇṇaṟkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaik
ṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar
tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya ro
ṅkeḻiṟ muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal
teṉṉavan vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramum teṇṭirai
Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eripaṭaikkeraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkula
taṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirThe right end is damaged upto line 18.
laittolperuṅkāval palapaḻantivum
viṟciṉavil yirupattoṟu(ru)kālaraicukaḷaikaṭ
rāman mevaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti
mpoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭu
l mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷappa
ḻoṭum piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamu nava
malaikaḷum vikkirama virar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭa valla matura maṇṭalamum
kāmiṭaivaḷai nāmaṇai koṇamum veñciṉa virar pañcap paḷḷiyum pāca
ṭaippaḻana mācuṇi tecamu mayarvilvaṇkīrtti yātinaka ravaiyiṟ ca
ndiraṉṟolkulat tindirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭi
ttu palataṉattoṭuniṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ cerimiḷai Oṭṭa
viḻaiyamum pūcurar cernalkocalaināṭu n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻi
ttu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit ti
kkiṇai kirtti takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovindacan=taṉ māviḻin=toṭa taṅkāta cāral va
ṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkukoṭṭal ma[hi]pālaṉai veñcamar viḷākattaru
cuviyttaruḷi yoṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa
luttaralāṭamum veṟimalar tīrtta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ
palakalañ celutti [caṅkirāmavijayottuṅkavarma]ṉākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai
lil viccātira toraṇamum pputava
muṅ kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟaicīvijaiyamum tuṟainīrppaṉṉai
yum vaṉmalaiyūraiyiṟṟoṉ malaiyūrum māḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭi
ṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai yilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal
māpappāḷamum (k)kāvalam puricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippaintūṟu
ṭai vaḷaippaintūṟum kalattakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamu tittamāval
viṉai mātam(ā)liṅkamum kalāmurikaṭuntiṟa lilāmuṟi tecamum tenkkavār po
ḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ karumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa ko
pparakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār [śrī]rājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatu
Digital edition of SII 17.308 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
